---
title: "About"
---

This is the companion notebook to the article:

**"A Users Guide to Uncovering Worker and Firm Effects: The ABC of AKM"**
published in the *Journal of Economic Perspectives*.

The notebook provides simple simulation examples to make concrete the different points developed in the paper.

## Authors

::: {layout-ncol=3 style="text-align: center;"}

![**Stéphane Bonhomme**<br>University of Chicago](images/bonhomme.png){style="border-radius: 50%; width: 180px; height: 180px; object-fit: cover;"}

![**Thibaut Lamadon**<br>University of Chicago](images/lamadon.jpg){style="border-radius: 50%; width: 180px; height: 180px; object-fit: cover;"}

![**Elena Manresa**<br>Princeton University](images/manresa.png){style="border-radius: 50%; width: 180px; height: 180px; object-fit: cover;"}

:::

## Links

- [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/tlamadon/abc-of-akm/blob/main/jep.ipynb)
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/tlamadon/abc-of-akm)
